metadata.summary: xv6-k210 内核完全由 C 语言编写（GCC 编译），kernel/ 和 include/ 目录下没有任何 Rust 源文件。搜索 RAII、Ownership、Lifetime 等关键词在整个仓库中均无匹配。内核使用传统的 C 风格引用计数（file->ref、anonfile->ref）和自旋锁/睡眠锁进行资源管理，没有 Rust 的所有权/生命周期/RAII 安全机制。
metadata.raw_output_excerpt:
Now I have a complete picture. The xv6-k210 kernel is entirely written in C (not Rust). There are no Rust RAII/ownership/lifetime mechanisms in the kernel. The only Rust code is in the bootloader/SBI layer (rustsbi), which is a separate component that runs in machine mode before the kernel starts.

Let me now produce the final structured JSON output.
